name: espathra
flavor_texts: It immobilizes opponents by bathing them in psychic power from its large eyes. Despite its appearance, it has a vicious temperament.
It emits psychic power from the gaps between its multicolored frills and sprints at speeds greater than 120 mph.
text: Espathra is the Ostrich Pokémon. It is a psychic-type Pokémon. Abilities: opportunist, frisk, speed-boost (hidden). Base stats — HP: 95, Attack: 60, Defense: 60, Sp. Atk: 101, Sp. Def: 60, Speed: 105. Evolution line: flittle → espathra. Lore: It immobilizes opponents by bathing them in psychic power from its large eyes. Despite its appearance, it has a vicious temperament. It emits psychic power from the gaps between its multicolored frills and sprints at speeds greater than 120 mph.
